formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
Here's the JSON array with the crucial formulas for CBSE Class 12 Physics - Nuclei:

[
  {
    "name": "Binding Energy per Nucleon",
    "formula": "B.E. per nucleon = Binding Energy / Total Mass Number",
    "variables": "Binding Energy, Total Mass Number",
    "units": "MeV, u",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Binding Energy",
    "formula": "B.E. = [Zm_H + (A - Z)m_n - m_A]c^2",
    "variables": "Z (atomic number), m_H (mass of hydrogen), A (mass number), m_n (mass of neutron), m_A (mass of nucleus), c (speed of light)",
    "units": "MeV",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Mass Defect",
    "formula": "Δm = [Zm_H + (A - Z)m_n - m_A]",
    "variables": "Z (atomic number), m_H (mass of hydrogen), A (mass number), m_n (mass of neutron), m_A (mass of nucleus)",
    "units": "u",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Radius of Nucleus",
    "formula": "r = r_0 \* A^(1/3)",
    "variables": "r (radius of nucleus), r_0 (constant), A (mass number)",
    "units": "fm, m",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Density of Nucleus",
    "formula": "ρ = (3m_A)/(4πr^3)",
    "variables": "ρ (density of nucleus), m_A (mass of nucleus), r (radius of nucleus)",
    "units": "g/cm^3",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Nuclear Stability",
    "formula": "N/Z ratio ≈ 1 for stable nuclei",
    "variables": "N (number of neutrons), Z (number of protons)",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Neutron-Proton Ratio",
    "formula": "N/P ratio ≈ 1 for stable nuclei",
    "variables": "N (number of neutrons), P (number of protons)",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  },
  {
    "name": "Neutron-Proton Ratio for Stability",
    "formula": "For even-even nuclei, N/P ratio > 1; for even-odd nuclei, N/P ratio ≈ 1; for odd-odd nuclei, N/P ratio < 1",
    "variables": "N (number of neutrons), P (number of protons)",
    "units": "",
    "notes": ""
  }
]
